titles.title: The Final Voice of the Hour

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The final Voice of the Hour Was sounded by the 7th angel It's what Revelation 10: 7 Hath proclaimed Hath proclaimed Declaring the mystery of God was finished Opening the little book Opening the little book For the Bride to see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It says, "Take it and eat it up Take it and eat it up And it shall make thy belly bitter But it shall be in thy mouth Sweet as honey Sweet as honey in thy mouth"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Revelation 10: 8-11 Was handed by the servants, The prophets It was a love letter whispering To the ears of the Bride As soon as the Word's made flesh And delved into the soul It was tried and tested In the blazing fire For me to be a radiant Bride

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I exclaimed "It was in my mouth, Sweet as honey But it became bitter in my belly" To understand and live by it To do the things that Jesus did That's what the little book Is all about

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I knew this is the very course I'd go through at every turn of the road To bring out the Word into life Before many nations, Tongues and kings The Bride is the spoken word By God's virtue, vested upon us So, wake up my radiant bride Wake up my radiant bride The harvest season is at hand

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It says, "Take it and eat it up Take it and eat it up And it shall make thy belly bitter But it shall be in thy mouth Sweet as honey Sweet as honey in thy mouth"

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: To understand and live by it To do the things what Jesus did That's what the little book Is all about

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: To walk today where Jesus Walked before We carry on the torch of true Life That's what the little book Is all about Glory! Hallelu - Hallelujah!
